hero.title: Find the right doctor, lab or scan — and book it in a minute.
hero.subtitle: Search, compare and book verified doctors, medical labs and radiology centers across Egypt. Instant confirmation, transparent pricing, and cashback on every visit.

verified.title: Every provider is verified
verified.description: We check licences, syndicate registration and accreditation before a profile goes live.

pricing.title: Transparent pricing
pricing.description: The consultation fee, test price or scan price you see is the price you pay. No surprises.

reviews.title: Real reviews only
reviews.description: Reviews can only be left by patients who actually completed a booking through Vesita.

specialties.title: Popular specialties
specialties.description: Pick a specialty and see every verified doctor near you, with real prices and open slots.

howItWorks.title: Four steps from symptom to appointment
howItWorks.description: No phone calls, no waiting on hold, no guessing what it will cost.

search.title: Search
search.description: Filter by specialty, area, price and rating — or just type a symptom, a test or a scan name.

slot.title: Pick a slot
slot.description: See real availability for the next 30 days and choose the time that fits your day.

confirm.title: Confirm instantly
confirm.description: Book in under a minute. You get an SMS and WhatsApp confirmation with the clinic address.

visit.title: Visit & earn cashback
visit.description: Pay cash at the clinic or online, then collect cashback in your Vesita wallet after the visit.

testimonials.title: What patients across Egypt say
testimonials.description: Every review on Vesita comes from a patient who completed a real booking.

mariam.name: Mariam Abdelrahman
mariam.quote: “I booked a paediatrician for my daughter at 11pm and had a 9am slot the next morning. The fee on the site was exactly what we paid at the clinic — no extra pounds at the reception desk.”

ahmed.name: Ahmed El-Sayed
ahmed.quote: “The lab sent someone to draw blood at my flat and the results were on WhatsApp the next afternoon. I used to lose half a day queuing for a CBC.”

nourhan.name: Nourhan Farouk
nourhan.quote: “I compared five MRI centers in Giza in about two minutes. The reviews were honest about waiting times, which is exactly what I needed to pick one.”

karim.name: Karim Mostafa
karim.quote: “My father needed a cardiologist urgently. The ‘available today’ filter found one 10 minutes from the house and we were seen that same evening.”

salma.name: Salma Hegazy
salma.quote: “The cashback is small but it adds up. After three visits I had enough in the wallet to cover most of a follow-up consultation.”

youssef.name: Youssef Ibrahim
youssef.quote: “I live outside Cairo and always assumed these platforms ignore us. Vesita had eleven verified doctors in my own city, with prices listed.”

faq.title: Questions patients ask us
faq.description: Still stuck? Call us on {phone}, any day from 9am to 11pm.

free.a: Yes. Booking a doctor, lab test or scan through Vesita costs you nothing extra — you pay the provider exactly the price shown on their profile. We earn a commission from the provider, never from you.

verification.q: How do I know a doctor or center is genuine?
verification.a: Every provider on Vesita is verified before their profile is published. For doctors we check Medical Syndicate registration and their specialty degree; for labs and radiology centers we check Ministry of Health licensing and any accreditation they claim, such as ISO or CAP.

cancel.q: Can I cancel or reschedule a booking?
cancel.a: You can cancel or move a booking free of charge from your dashboard up to 4 hours before the appointment. If you paid online, the refund is returned to your original payment method or your Vesita wallet, whichever you choose.

payment.a: Most patients pay cash at the clinic. You can also pay online with a credit or debit card, Vodafone Cash, or InstaPay — and paying online is what makes you eligible for cashback on the visit.

cashback.q: What is cashback and how do I use it?
cashback.a: Selected doctors, labs and radiology centers run cashback campaigns that return a percentage of the amount you paid as Vesita wallet credit, usually within 24 hours of the completed visit. Wallet credit can be applied to any future booking on the platform.

homeCollection.q: Do labs really collect samples from my home?
homeCollection.a: Many do. Labs that offer it show a “Home sample collection” badge on their profile, and you pick the home-visit option while booking. A trained phlebotomist comes to your address in the time window you choose, and results arrive digitally.

cta.title: Your next appointment is a minute away
cta.description: Search verified doctors, labs and radiology centers near you — see real prices and real availability before you commit.
